meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about your lack of portfolio. Learn how to use Git with AI, Antigravity, and Claude Code to build revenue-generating SaaS apps in days.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders only care about shipped value. By leveraging Git-integrated AI workflows with tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can rapidly prototype, document, and deploy production-ready features. Stop building 'projects' and start building a verifiable trail of revenue-generating SaaS assets.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the silence of a missing portfolio echoing louder than your ambition. The market doesn't reward 'potential'; it rewards proof. Every day you spend worrying about a lack of history is a day you aren't capturing market share.

The shift happens when you stop viewing code as a chore and start viewing it as a leverageable asset. By mastering an AI-augmented Git workflow, you can turn a single weekend into a series of high-impact commits that prove your technical execution to any investor or client.

steps.title: Initialize the Lean MVP Repository
steps.description: Establish a professional Git structure that treats your code as a commercial product rather than a sandbox.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional repository structure for a SaaS MVP including a README.md, /src, /tests, and a LICENSE file. Focus on clean architecture for a scalable Node.js application.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate boilerplate code, ensuring you spend time on business logic rather than syntax.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust authentication module using JWT and Supabase. Include error handling and unit tests for the login flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate auth module with supabase and jwt'

steps.title: Iterative Commit Strategy
steps.description: Document your progress through granular commits that show a clear trajectory of feature development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file changes and write a professional commit message following conventional commits standards (feat:, fix:, chore:).
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'feat: implement stripe subscription billing logic'

steps.title: Test-Driven Development via AI
steps.description: Prove your code quality by having AI generate tests that validate your business logic immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Jest unit tests for the payment processing service. Cover success, failure, and edge cases for API responses.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate jest tests for payment-service.ts'

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize the build and document it in a way that non-technical stakeholders can understand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the project's technical architecture and key business features into a high-level documentation file for a potential investor.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update documentation for investor review'

pro_tips: Treat every commit message as a marketing headline; investors read your Git history to gauge your communication skills.
Use AI to identify 'technical debt' early so your portfolio projects look like enterprise-grade code, not hackathons.
Always include a 'Business Logic' section in your README to explain why you built a feature, not just how.
Leverage Claude Code to automate your CI/CD pipeline configuration; it saves hours of DevOps overhead.
Publicize your progress on X or LinkedIn by linking directly to specific, impressive Git commits rather than just the repo.
content.next_steps: Now that you have your first repository, push it to GitHub, pin it to your profile, and start building your second module. Consistency is your new portfolio.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. You have the tools to ship, the logic to scale, and the strategy to win. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
